description:
500px provided description: Part of the series "Nataraja": i.dmaculate.me/tagged/Nataraja

This tree reminded me of Nataraja, the Lord of Dance. The Hindu god Shiva takes the form of this cosmic dancer to destroy a weary universe and prepare for its renewal, by the god Bramha who starts the process of creation. [#tree ,#green ,#shadows ,#conceptual ,#Shiv ,#Nataraja ,#Upper Mystic Lake]
